title: Crunchy Spanish Haddock Pisto Manchego Bake
description: A flavorful and crunchy Spanish-inspired dish featuring haddock, pisto manchego, and a blend of umami flavors, perfect for a date night, and vegetarian-friendly with the option to substitute haddock with portobello mushrooms, served in a bamboo steamer for a unique presentation.

ingredients.name: haddock fillets
ingredients.notes: or portobello mushrooms for vegetarian option

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together pisto manchego sauce, olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the haddock fillets to the bowl and coat with the pisto manchego sauce mixture.
In a separate bowl, toss the cherry tomatoes and red onion with a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a bamboo steamer, create a layer of cherry tomatoes and red onion.
Place a haddock fillet on top of the vegetable layer.
Sprinkle shredded manchego cheese over the haddock fillet.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the bamboo steamer with a lid and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the fish is cooked through.
